title: Design a Form — Presets, Token Overrides, Per-Question Media
summary: Give a Form a visual identity. Pick one of 6 bundled presets (card-light, fullscreen-dark, conversational-left, form-on-image, minimal-print, agency-bold), override design tokens (--primary, --button-radius, --font-heading, --layout-max-width, …), and attach per-question media (background image, side-image split, top hero, or autoplay video). Use whenever the user asks for 'theme my form', 'match the brand on this form', 'background image per question', 'split-image form', 'fullscreen form', 'Typeform look'.
